entities.name: PHYSIOLOGICAL TRAIT NETWORKS
entities.description: Complex networks of structural and physiological traits that influence plant function

entities.name: PLANT-SOIL-CLIMATE INTERACTIONS
entities.description: The interactions between plants, soil, and climate that affect plant growth

entities.name: TREES
entities.description: Terrestrial Regional Ecosystem Exchange Simulator used to evaluate physiological trait networks

entities.name: MAIZE
entities.description: The crop used in the study to evaluate physiological trait networks

entities.name: NET PRIMARY PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: A measure of the rate at which plants produce net useful chemical energy

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The amount of grain harvested per unit area

entities.name: CLIMATE SCENARIOS
entities.description: Five contrasting climate scenarios used for simulations

entities.name: HIGH PRECIPITATION ENVIRONMENTS
entities.description: Environments characterized by high levels of precipitation

entities.name: WATER USE STRATEGIES
entities.description: Strategies employed by plants to manage water use

entities.name: DEEP ROOTS
entities.description: Root systems that penetrate deep into the soil to access water

entities.name: HIGH STOMATAL CONDUCTANCE AT LOW WATER POTENTIAL
entities.description: The ability of stomata to remain open even when water potential is low

entities.name: RISKY STOMATAL REGULATION
entities.description: A strategy characterized by high stomatal conductance at low water potential

entities.name: HIGH XYLEM HYDRAULIC CONDUCTIVITY
entities.description: The efficiency of water transport through the xylem

entities.name: HIGH MAXIMAL LEAF AREA INDEX
entities.description: A high ratio of total upper leaf surface area to ground surface area

entities.name: DRY ENVIRONMENTS
entities.description: Environments characterized by low water availability

entities.name: LOW LATE-SEASON PRECIPITATION
entities.description: A specific climate condition where precipitation is low during the late season

entities.name: WATER CONSERVING TRAIT NETWORKS
entities.description: Trait networks that help the plant conserve water in dry environments

entities.name: HIGH EMBOLISM RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of the plant to resist the formation of air bubbles in the xylem

entities.name: LOW STOMATAL CONDUCTANCE AT LOW LEAF WATER POTENTIAL
entities.description: The tendency of stomata to close when leaf water potential is low

entities.name: CONSERVATIVE STOMATAL REGULATION
entities.description: A strategy characterized by low stomatal conductance at low leaf water potential

entities.name: SOIL CHARACTERISTICS
entities.description: Physical and chemical properties of the soil

entities.name: CROP PERFORMANCE
entities.description: The overall growth and yield of a crop in a given environment
